subtasks.description: Query SQL to identify publishers with declining quarterly revenue/usage trends in 2024 (Q1 > Q2 > Q3 > Q4 or similar declining pattern). Return publisher ID, name, and quarterly metrics.

For each declining publisher from the SQL results, perform cross-reconciliation of current contract state (MongoDB) with historical trend data, then generate renewal recommendations (hold/expand/reduce) based on financial decline, contract terms, and risk signals.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks with minimal overhead: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to fetch declining publishers because the quarterly trend detection requires multi-column aggregation and date logic across 2024 data; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to reconcile contract state (MongoDB) with the SQL trend data and generate recommendations, since recommendation logic involves multiple signals (trend, contract terms, risk) from two sources. No separate policy_action needed because renewal recommendation is a core output of cross_recon reconciliation, not a separate compliance evaluation. Total subtasks = 2 (the minimum needed).

output.raw_output:
{
  "sql": "WITH quarterly_revenue AS (SELECT publisher, CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2024-04-01' THEN 1 WHEN event_date >= '2024-04-01' AND event_date < '2024-07-01' THEN 2 WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN 3 WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN 4 END AS quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS quarterly_revenue, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS quarterly_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher, quarter), pivot_quarters AS (SELECT publisher, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q1_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q2_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q3_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q4_revenue, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_seats END) AS q1_seats, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_seats END) AS q2_seats, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_seats END) AS q3_seats, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_seats END) AS q4_seats FROM quarterly_revenue GROUP BY publisher) SELECT publisher, COALESCE(q1_revenue, 0) AS q1_revenue_usd, COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) AS q2_revenue_usd, COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) AS q3_revenue_usd, COALESCE(q4_revenue, 0) AS q4_revenue_usd, COALESCE(q1_seats, 0) AS q1_seats, COALESCE(q2_seats, 0) AS q2_seats, COALESCE(q3_seats, 0) AS q3_seats, COALESCE(q4_seats, 0) AS q4_seats, CASE WHEN COALESCE(q1_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) AND COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) AND COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q4_revenue, 0) THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN COALESCE(q1_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) AND COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN COALESCE(q2_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) AND COALESCE(q3_revenue, 0) > COALESCE(q4_revenue
